error_pattern: RuntimeError: Attempting settings a value during the ReadOnly phase
fix_strategy: Insert `await Timer(1, 'ps')` before the signal assignment causing the error to transition to a writable phase.

error_pattern: ValueError: Timer argument time must be positive
AssertionError: mst_valid asserted with zero credit
fix_strategy: Check TB model synchronization. Ensure inputs are sampled pre-edge and outputs post-edge. Verify if model state update order matches RTL register update logic.
